title: cephalanthera humilis
intro: Cephalanthera humilis, also known as the dwarf helleborine, is a rare and delicate species of orchid native to Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions, providing health benefits such as improved breathing and relief from coughing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in some traditional remedies and supplements.
